title: gleichenia subtrisperma
intro: Gleichenia subtrisperma is a species of fern known as a type of polypody fern, which is a group of ferns that are commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve pain, making it a valuable remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Gleichenia subtrisperma include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, where the dried leaves are steeped in hot water to release its medicinal properties.
